name: Add CLI help command
acceptance_criteria: Running --help prints usage with all flags documented

name: Add JSON config file loader
acceptance_criteria: Reads config.json from project root, validates required fields, returns parsed object

name: Implement webhook retry with exponential backoff
acceptance_criteria: Failed webhook deliveries retry 3 times with 1s/2s/4s delays, logs each attempt

name: Build markdown table parser
acceptance_criteria: Parses pipe-delimited markdown tables into array of objects with header keys, handles alignment rows

name: Implement multi-file search with ranked results
acceptance_criteria: Searches across files using TF-IDF scoring, returns top-N results with file path and line number, handles binary file exclusion
